transcript.clean_text: there are some days in cycling that you just can't fathom and this was one of them on the Walter Catalunya an amended course for stage six they trimmed off The High Ground at the very end and it meant that the sprinters had no fear we expected it then to all come together in a predictable finale it was anything but by the time we reached our destination well a reasonably complex final three kilometers but the last climb now being amended it was going to be a real charge for that line we came out of the blocks right at the beginning of the day and a breakaway always was going to have a chance however the pace of everybody in the pack was something to behold in fact there was an early intermediate Sprint and it was Primos Rockledge that took it ahead of Remco that meant an extra second between them overall expanded Gap now out to 11 seconds well the Breakaway was about to be caught there was one climb still to be had the question was who would go for it with the Breakaway courts Bouchard decided he would have a little bit of a roll of the dice but not to be and then Mark Solaire struck out a man who was on exactly the same time overall in the top five with Mika Lander and he wanted more over the top of this peak there was a second intermediate Sprint Solaire was on his own would anyone else be tempted to go and it was Evan upon himself away he went and roll it straight onto his back wheel well they had one intermediate spend as we mentioned at the beginning of the day there was another one still to come but on the seconds up for grabs but could they push on and then duke it out in a Sprint between the pair of them that was the big question ever Nepal's mind was just starting to shred a little bit he was getting very very upset with roglich not giving him a turn they wound in Mark Solaire well Solaire the possibility of him getting an intermediate Sprint bonus second was also hanging over mickellander and Bahrain who were giving Chase and so the Gap was never large and then the arguments began evident Paul not happy that he was not being given a turn by Primus roglich and bahrain's efforts to neutralize first of all Solaire ultimately meant that this kick for the line was also doomed they all came back together with 8.4 kilometers to go we were wondering how this would pan out the intermediate Sprint was there suddenly jumbo vismo were Lively once more this was for roglitch and Evan Nepal responded and with anger and so much so he managed to cross the line The Three Amigos had been up the road earlier together were also those that duked it out for bonus seconds nicolanda seeding a precious second to Mark Solaire who Moved ahead of him into fourth in the overall classification on as even then as far as the intermediate bonus seconds are concerned back to 10 seconds the gap spin finish yes Splinter two have won so far on this race Kaden Groves unfortunately technical for him very late on last three kilometers had to take the bike of Sandra Maurice would he get back indeed when we started to light up for the Sprint well he was certainly going to be in the frame either shelling was one of those that started the move for Borah Hans grower trying to monster up the center as well even the Paul himself was already engaged also having a dig here Maxim van Hills for a lot of Destiny and then throwing out the line to beat Koka guess who Kanan Groves talk about keeping you cool in adversity this day had it all there were stories of Plenty at every turn of the page throughout it was simply remarkable Groves ahead of cooker on the line what a run Bunch bent on somebody else's bike are you kidding no Groves Cocker shelling van Hills Evan apoll still using his anger safely inside the top 10 no Gap at the end between that it's 10 seconds in the general classification as you were both having finished in front of the other as far as the intermediates are concerned so one day still to go Barcelona and of course the mighty climb that we love so much about this place a dive down into town the laps come relentlessly one after the other and then finally we have some respite awaits let the lapse begin let us find our champion in this Amazing Race you cannot beat Catalunya for drama make sure you catch up with how it finishes tomorrow
